title: TAC-459 Generative AI and Applied Machine Learning for Natural Language Processing (NLP)
subtitle: University of Southern California (USC), Viterbi School of Engineering

instructor.title: Adjunct Professor of Generative AI and NLP at USC
instructor.name: Allen Bolourchi

courseDescription:
Learn the state-of-the-art technology in Artificial Intelligence, including the latest AI tools and algorithms in Natural Language Processing (NLP), Generative AI, and models such as GPT/BERT, along with Tensorflow, Keras and Hugging Face. 
You will explore the fundamentals of NLP and discover which technologies and products have been developed using NLP and Generative AI for text. The course covers how to utilize pre-trained Large Language Models (LLMs) and their APIs, fine-tune LLMs, and retrain LLMs.

courseSchedule.title: Introduction to NLP and AI
topics: Historical Evolution of AI and NLP
Key Concepts in Machine Learning and NLP
Overview of NLP Applications in Various Domains
Basic Text Processing and Language Understanding

courseSchedule.title: Text Cleaning and Preprocessing
topics: Overview of python libraries such as NLTK, Spacy, regex etc.

courseSchedule.title: Fundamentals of Machine Learning for NLP
topics: Supervised Learning and Unsupervised Learning - Key Algorithms for NLP
Training, Validation, and Test Sets in Model Development

courseSchedule.title: Neural Networks and Deep Learning in NLP
topics: Challenges in Deep Learning for NLP
Case Studies in Deep Learning for NLP

courseSchedule.title: Transformer Models and Attention Mechanisms
topics: Concepts of Self-Attention and Positional Encoding
Overview of BERT, GPT, and Transformer Variants
Applications of Transformer Models in NLP
Training Transformer Models for NLP Tasks
Challenges and Solutions with Transformer Models

courseSchedule.title: Syntax, Parsing, Word Embeddings, and POS Tagging
topics: Part-of-Speech (POS) Tagging: Importance, Methods, and Tools
Practical Parsing, Embedding, and POS Tagging Techniques

courseSchedule.title: Semantic Analysis, Language Models, and Question Answering
topics: Overview of Language Models in NLP
Introduction to Question Answering System and Utilizing Language Models
Challenges in QA and Semantic Analysis

courseSchedule.title: Text Classification and Machine Translation + Midterm Exam
topics: Challenges and Evaluation Metrics for MT

courseSchedule.title: Advanced Topics in Machine Learning and NLP
topics: Model Interpretability and Explainability in NLP
Case Studies of Advanced ML in NLP

courseSchedule.title: Named Entity Recognition, Information Retrieval and Search
topics: Deep Dive into TF-IDF and Co-occurrence Matrix

courseSchedule.title: Advanced Machine Translation and Summarization
topics: Handling Low-Resource Languages in (Machine Tranlsation) MT
Current Trends in MT and Summarization

courseSchedule.title: Speech Processing and Conversational AI
topics: Design and Development of Conversational Agents
Evaluating Dialogue Systems in Conversational AI
Natural Language Understanding in Conversational AI
Case Studies in Speech Processing and Conversational AI

courseSchedule.title: Generative AI, Products, Techniques, APIs, and Ethical Considerations
topics: Generative Models in NLP (ChatGPT, BARD, Gemini, Llama)
Advanced Prompt Engineering: Few-shot, Chain-of-thought, and Self-Consistency
Expanding LLM Capabilities: Knowledge Generation Prompting and Program-aided (PAL)
Developing an API with MongoDB and ngrok, and interfacing via Postman
LLM Safety: Prompt Injection, Prompt Leaking, Jailbreaking
Responsible AI, Data Privacy, Ethical Considerations, and Governance in AI
Business Intelligence, Marketing, Analytics, and Brand Analysis Use Cases
Introduction to Product Management and Business Considerations

courseSchedule.title: Training and Fine-Tuning LLMs, Hugging Face, LangChain, and RAG
topics: Training of Chat GPT with Reinforcement Learning, HITL, and Proximal Policy Optimization
Evaluation of LLMs: MMLU, HellaSwag Benchmark, ARC, WinoGrade, GSM-8k, Truthful QA, PIQA
LoRA and QLoRA for Efficient Model Adaptation
Fine Tuning LLMs, Best Practices and Challenges
Overview and Practical Use of Hugging Face in NLP Based Products
Utilizing LangChain and Llama for Customized Language Models

courseSchedule.title: Course Review, Future Trends, and Project Presentations + Final Exam
topics: Recap of Key NLP and Generative AI Concepts
Discussion on the Future Trends in NLP and Generative AI

technologicalProficiency: Familiarity with Google Colab and Python is necessary. If you haven’t used them, familiarize yourself with Google Colab and set it up. We will teach you the rest of the python packages in the classroom.
